hook_type: Cadence-of-three numbers + punch-line curiosity gap (Halbert pattern interrupt + specificity)
tactic: Numbers-first scroll-stop -> mechanism reveal -> recursion punch
primary_text:
$234M raised. 137,000 investors. None of them VCs.

That is what Crowd-Sourced Funding has done in Australia since 2018, and we built the rails. 324 raises through us so far: Naked Life, Our Cow, Medigrowth.

Now we are opening our own raise.

Save your spot. We will tell you the moment the offer goes live.

*Always consider the general CSF risk warning and offer document before investing.
headline: How Australian startups actually get funded
description: Save your spot to hear when our CSF offer opens.
_v3_changes: Hook rewrite: '324 Australian companies have raised on Birchal. Most Australians have never invested in one.' -> '$234M raised. 137,000 investors. None of them VCs.' Three specific numbers in 8 words; the third creates a mechanism gap (then who?). Halbert score 4->5.
Body restructured: opens with the punch line, then mechanism reveal as the gap-closer in para 2.
_drc_playbook: 03 Aspirational Identity Sell (B2C considered, solution-aware, sophistication 3 mechanism)
_drc_audience: B2C considered, solution-aware. First-time CSF investors, currently using ETFs / Sharesies / Pearler.
_a_pile_signals: curiosity gap ('None of them VCs' -> who then?)
_compliance_findings_resolved: PREOFFER-VERBS: 'save your spot', 'tell you the moment'. No transaction verbs.
VERBATIM-OFFER-LANGUAGE: 'we will tell you the moment the offer goes live'. No 'we will send'.
BRAND-EXCLUDED: only verified-good raises (Naked Life, Our Cow, Medigrowth).
